title: Faranah Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Faranah, with a Z-Score of +3.34. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Faranah is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 67%, and the wind speed is 4.8 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The absence of any significant wind or precipitation is exacerbating the heat wave conditions, leading to a critical situation.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
